ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-28-2002 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up In Scd 218 At 09:00 Am On September 16,2002.
Off Calendar Sep-16-2002 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Cause assigned to Dept. 218 for Default Prove-Up hearing. Present: Commissioner Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: P. Dias; Reporter: Mary Ellen Scherer. Plaintiff represented by and through his counsel, Robert Mazzetti, III, presents evidence. Ron Svasek is sworn and examined. Good cause appearing, the court signs judgment for plaintiff in the total sum of $128,507.92. (see imaged document.
